name: Best Beef Pot Roast/cp
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Beef chuck or blade roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast.
2. Place the browned roast in the crockpot.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Cook the roast in the crockpot for 7 to 9 hours on low heat.
5. In a separate skillet, simmer about a cup of water used for browning the roast.
6. Stir to incorporate all brown bits from the skillet.
7. Save this liquid for use in gravy.
